name: Peach Melba
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Low-fat vanilla yogurt (or sugar substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place each peach half in a serving dish.
2. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of yogurt over each peach half.
3. Pour the raspberry puree over the yogurt.
4. Add a sugar substitute before serving if the puree needs to be sweetened.
Serving size: 62 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 1 gram protein, 13 grams carbohydrate, 0 fat, 37 mg sodium
Adapted from Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, 1993. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier in March 1994.
